channel.title: Homes on Adrián Moreno Peña | VP of Technology @ Worksome ⸱ Product & Engineering Leader (Copenhagen)
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on Adrián Moreno Peña | VP of Technology @ Worksome ⸱ Product & Engineering Leader (Copenhagen)

item.title: Home
item.description:
Hello, I'm Adrián.

Engineer, builder, leader

I lead Product, Engineering, and Design at Worksome — a Danish company reshaping how businesses and independent professionals work together.

My focus: aligning business strategy, product strategy, and engineering execution — so teams ship outcomes that move the business, and keep doing it as the company scales.
